query:
SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.name, u.username
FROM users u
WHERE u.name LIKE '%巧克力%' OR u.username LIKE '%巧克力%';

SELECT u.name AS engineer_name,
       se.businessDate,
       se.id AS station_event_id,
       se.productId,
       se.countForProductivity,
       psd.id AS detail_id,
       psd.targetConfigId,
       psd.earnedPoints,
       p.batchNo,
       p.importedCategoryName,
       p.importedBrandName,
       p.categoryId AS product_category_id
FROM station_events se
JOIN users u ON u.id = se.operatorUserId
JOIN products p ON p.id = se.productId
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
WHERE se.stationCode = 'E'
  AND se.eventType = 'complete'
  AND (u.name LIKE '%巧克力%' OR u.username LIKE '%巧克力%')
  AND se.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
ORDER BY se.businessDate DESC, se.id DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT u.name AS engineer_name,
       edp.businessDate,
       edp.totalPoints,
       edp.kpiScore,
       edp.totalCompletedQty,
       edp.stationBreakdownJson
FROM engineer_daily_productivity edp
JOIN users u ON u.id = edp.userId
WHERE (u.name LIKE '%巧克力%' OR u.username LIKE '%巧克力%')
  AND edp.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
ORDER BY edp.businessDate DESC;
